sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111181" key="filo/qreskos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλό-θρεσκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111181.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving ceremonies, pious,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βασιλῆες</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Hymn.Is.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θρεσκός, θρησκεία.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
